_note: Fallback initial water levels (% of station design capacity) and ThaiWater-style gauge snapshot used when live HII/ThaiWater endpoints are unreachable. Values are a plausible wet-season baseline, not live readings — the UI shows a 'cached' badge when this file is in use.
